Upstream scripts from [hil-se/EfficientSPEComparativeLearning](https://github.com/hil-se/EfficientSPEComparativeLearning) (TensorFlow / Keras).

Not required to reproduce our paper. Use `scripts/` and `robust_spe/` instead.

Original dependencies: `tensorflow`, `fasttext` (see commented lines in root `requirements.txt`).
